name: Lemon Baked Cod
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the melted margarine and lemon juice.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the flour, salt, and white pepper.
3. Dip each cod fillet into the margarine mixture, then coat with the flour mixture.
4. Place the coated fish in an 8 x 8 x 2-inch baking pan.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 to 30 minutes.
6. Pour any remaining margarine mixture over the fish before serving.
